description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine gic_thermal_impact_1, and is implemented by a call to gic_thermal_impact_1. Use this API to calculate Transformer Thermal Impact assessement GIC(t) curve using specified effective Eastward GIC(E) and Nortward GIC(N) for one specific transformer. The geoelectric field waveshape used could be NERC TPL-007-2 Benchmark event, NERC TPL-007-2 Supplemental event or User specified event. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.10.0 and 34.2.0. ierr = gic_thermal_impact(gicearg, gicnarg, xmerlbl, gictfarg)

parameters.name: gicearg
parameters.description: Transfomer effective per phase gic due to eastward geoelectic field, gic(e) due to ee=1 v/km and en=0, with alpha and beta factors applied. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: gicnarg
parameters.description: Transfomer effective per phase gic due to northward geoelectic field, gic(n) due to en=1 v/km and ee=0, with alpha and beta factors applied. (input; 0 by default).

parameters.name: gictfarg
parameters.description: Transformer thermal analysis gic(t) csv file (output). (input; ‘’ by default).

error_codes.description: No or invalid GICEARG value provided.
No or invalid GICNARG value provided.
No GMD Event EE(t) and EN(t) data available.
